description: Key-free web search + single-page fetch for agents. Search runs against a hosted endpoint (Exa or Parallel) with no API key. web_fetch reads a page to markdown, also no config.
author: tianshu-ai

fields.label: Search backend
fields.description: Which hosted endpoint web_search queries. Both are key-free (anonymous free tier). Exa returns highlighted excerpts; Parallel returns ranked results. web_fetch is unaffected.

fields.label: Per-request timeout
fields.description: Network timeout for each web_search / web_fetch call. Increase if you hit timeouts on slow networks.
